name: Cosmic Resistance
short_description: You are the fleet commander. Different alien races invade the universe. Find and fight for saving scattered human colonies, integrate them in your ship fleet to help you create a powerful army that will liberate the universe and humankind from extinction.
detailed_description:
Cosmic Resistance is an engaging 2D pixel art casual game with strategy elements that puts you in the role of a skilled fleet commander. Tasked with leading the charge against an alien invasion, your objective is to liberate humanity from their tyrannical rule.

Planets hold the key to victory! Conquer these celestial bodies and harness their abundant resources to fuel your epic fight against the relentless alien invasion. Your strategic prowess will determine the fate of the universe in this thrilling cosmic adventure!

Build shipyards, Build Defense Stations and of course ships. The universe awaits your command!

Key Elements:

- Epic Alien Onslaught: Face an incredible threat from outer space as you navigate through a universe under attack.
- Humanity's Last Stand: Lead the charge to reclaim scattered colonies and bring hope back to a desperate galaxy.
- Strategic Command: Use tactical brilliance as the chosen General to outsmart and outmaneuver the alien forces.
- Casual Appeal, Strategic Depth: Experience easy-to-play gameplay with layers of strategy, suitable for both casual and experienced commanders.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal
